name: Dual Attack
label: Dual Attack
description: Triggers an additional attack by an ally.

name: Double Dual Attack
label: Double Dual Attack
description: Triggers two additional attacks by allies.

name: Barrier
label: Barrier
description: Creates a protective shield that absorbs damage.

name: Reduces Allies Skill Cooldowns
label: Reduces Allies Skill Cooldowns
description: Decreases the cooldown time of allies’ skills.

name: Critical Hit Chance
label: Critical Hit Chance
description: Increases the chance to land a critical hit.

name: Generate Chain Points
label: Generate Chain Points
description: Generates Chain Points used for Chain Skills.

name: Increase Priority
label: Increase Priority
description: Increases the skill's priority in turn order.

name: Increased Evasion
label: Increased Evasion
description: Raises the chance to evade incoming attacks.

name: Invulnerability
label: Invulnerability
description: Grants immunity to all damage and debuffs.

name: Increased Resilience
label: Increased Resilience
description: Increases resistance to debuffs.

name: Increase Attack
label: Increase Attack
description: Increases the unit's Attack.

name: Increased Speed
label: Increased Speed
description: Increases the unit's Speed.

name: Stealth
label: Stealth
description: Makes the unit untargetable by enemies.

name: Extra Turn
label: Extra Turn
description: Grants an immediate additional turn.

name: Buff Removal
label: Buff Removal
description: Removes active buffs from the target.

name: Taunted
label: Taunted
description: Forces the target to attack the caster.

name: Reduced Accuracy
label: Reduced Accuracy
description: Decreases the unit’s chance to hit.

name: Frozen
label: Frozen
description: Prevents the unit from taking action.

name: Marked
label: Marked
description: Increases damage taken by the unit.

name: Reduced Attack
label: Reduced Attack
description: Decreases the unit’s Attack.
